tweets.text: RT @daudig: Is the opposite of being the world's policeman being its self-appointed neighborhood watch guy?
I'm gonna go blast music in the kitchen and wash the sink of dishes before parents come home.
To be completely honest, I was a little bit excited that the LHC might cause a black hole. It would be exciting, at the very least.
Failwhale.
Dear America's Toughest Jobs, STOP DOING SHIT IN ALASKA. WE GET IT. IT'S REALLY COLD. EVERY JOB SUCKS.
It's about time to head into the studio.
It is time for sleep and yet I am still awake, I very much hope my nap will make me feel refreshed tomorrow In bed listening to Ender's Game
Listening to Ender's Game. Orson Scott Card is a genius. I should be sleeping right now.
Doing some homework... erk. Spanish, Global Studies, Spanish, and English. Earth science tomorrow morning. >.<
Just woke up from a nap. Hm. I wonder what this will do ro my sleeping. Still have homework to do too.

When people are terrible and I do not destroy them, how do I ensure they are not confused as to why. I want to choose to be gracious, but I also want them to know they are not being destroyed because of my patience, honed daily, not because of weakness or reluctance.
